steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
Both expressions equal $y$, so set them equal.
$$x+8=x^2+14x+48$$
Move all terms to one side.
$$x^2+13x+40=0$$

steps.title: Find the greater root
steps.content: Factor the quadratic. $$(x+5)(x+8)=0$$ So the possible $x$-values are $-5$ and $-8$. The greatest of these is $-5$. The answer is A.
